DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Individual components may be inoperative provided:

ListItem.Para: Associated components are deactivated or isolated.
Associated system components are verified not to have leaks.

Note.Para: Any portion of system which operates normally may be used.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate or isolate inoperative components and verify associated system components do not have leaks (AMM DDG 38-10-01).

Note.Para: Due to the wide variety of galley, lavatory and drinking fountain installations and various component failure possibilities, operators must develop procedures tailored to their specific installations.

ListItem.Para: Procedures are established to ensure that system is not serviced.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Drain potable water system and establish procedures to ensure potable water system is not serviced (AMM DDG 38-10-01).

OperationNote.rev:revHighlight: Added (O) note to provide additional dispatch guidance.
OperationNote.Para: If the potable water system is drained and not service, the airplane weight and balance should be adjusted accordingly. Contact dispatcher for flight planning update.
